item: Define session-receipt.json for prompt, context, diff, commands, tests, skipped checks, findings, and final disposition.

source_examples: OpenAI Euphony; SWE-bench; agent-governance-toolkit
completion_note: Local agent session receipt schema added to agent-workflow-kit and mirrored into repo-contract-kit templates.

item: Add concise human summary rendered from session receipts.
why: Humans need the evidence without reading full transcripts.
source_examples: CodeRabbit; Devin Review; Euphony
completion_note: scripts/render_session_receipt_summary.py renders concise Markdown from completed session receipts; Makefile exposes make receipt-summary RECEIPT=... and tests cover command counts, docs impact, TDD evidence, findings, and next actions.

item: Create a persona manifest schema with source boundaries, allowed actions, expected output schema, max findings, and risk focus.
why: Turns prompt personas into validated workflow components.
source_examples: codex-subagents-mcp; open-code-review; Claude /ultrareview
completion_note: Persona manifest schema and local-first/tool-agnostic persona manifest added with read-only modes, allowed actions, finding caps, and required evidence.

item: Add a review-synthesis JSON schema with severity, confidence, file/line, evidence, false-positive notes, and recommended action.
why: Enables automation and noise controls.
source_examples: Triplecheck; PR-Agent; code review automation papers
completion_note: Added schemas/review-synthesis.schema.json and updated the synthesis prompt/docs so runners can require structured findings, remediation batches, human decisions, rejected suggestions, and final disposition.

item: Add risk classifier for high-risk diffs: auth, migrations, data deletion, CI, security, docs-contract changes, and public APIs.
why: Deep review fleets should run where they add value.
source_examples: Claude /ultrareview; SonarQube AI assurance
completion_note: scripts/classify_review_risk.py emits risk tier, trust profile, trigger rules, guidance, and persona routing; review-risk schema, prompt policy, Make target, and tests are in place.

item: Prototype read-only multi-agent review runner that writes JSON artifacts only.

source_examples: codex-subagents-mcp; open-code-review
delivery_shape: CLI wrapper or documented Codex command recipe.
completion_note: repo-contract-kit now installs scripts/agent_review_run.py and make agent-run-review. Manual mode generates persona prompts and JSON placeholders; Amp mode runs read-only personas through amp --execute --stream-json, stores raw/structured artifacts, runs synthesis, and fails on git-status mutation.

item: Add red-green receipt fields to TDD prompts: failing test command/output, passing command/output, and exception reason if skipped.

completion_note: TDD prompts and receipt schema now require failing/passing evidence, generated-test provenance, and skip/exception reasons.

delivery_shape: Targeted research synthesis, feature matrix update, design note or ADR candidate, and follow-on backlog/task-packet proposals for harness quality metrics, a harness component map, and test fixtures.

source_examples: AGW-032; AGW-041; AGW-062; OpenAI prompt caching docs; Anthropic prompt caching and context editing docs; prompt compression/context engineering papers; Tokenomics repo findings
delivery_shape: Targeted research synthesis, token-budget inventory, prompt/context compaction principles, regression checks for required evidence fields, and backlog proposals for measurable token-efficiency gates.

completion_note: Task-packet and session-receipt schemas now carry harness_metrics, the task-packet prompt/template names metric capture, and repo-contract-kit 0.4.24 emits/validates installed receipt metrics.

why: Task packets strongly constrain scope, docs, validation, and closeout, but they do not require every task to reconcile with a repo or folder aim or flag when the aim should adapt.

completion_note: agent-workflow-kit 0.2.16 adds a required task-packet goal_alignment object, prompt/template guidance, generated Codex adapters, docs, and regression fixture defaults so unknown, conflicting, or adaptation-needed alignment stops before implementation handoff.

why: The workflow already has deterministic scripts for risk, docs impact, context, token budgets, and task readiness, but prompts can still spend tokens rediscovering the same facts instead of consuming compact reports and escalating only ambiguous cases.

completion_note: agent-workflow-kit 0.2.17 teaches task-packet, maintainer-queue, verification, and prompt-index guidance to consume compact deterministic reports before broad repo rereads, preserves scoped source fallback and omission evidence, adds deterministic-report-routing fixture controls, refreshes adapters/docs, and validates the prompt regression path.

item: Add closeout-first task packet contract and refusal language for unfinished prior work.

completion_note: agent-workflow-kit 0.2.18 adds a required closeout-first startup contract to task packets with previous_task_state and closeout_required_before_start, updates task-packet/fix-implementer/maintainer/verification prompts and generated adapters with safe-start/refuse-start/blocker-escalation language, adds ARF-007 regression coverage, docs, tests, and active packet safe-start evidence.
